summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY: The MapContext class is a context object that is given to the Mapper.

CORE LOGIC: The MapContext class provides access to the input split for the map.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS: The MapContext class takes four type parameters: KEYIN, VALUEIN, KEYOUT, and VALUEOUT, which represent the input and output types of the Mapper.

DEPENDENCIES: The MapContext class implements the TaskInputOutputContext interface, which provides access to the input and output data.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

The Mapper class is responsible for transforming input records into intermediate records.

CORE LOGIC:

The map() method is the core logic of the Mapper class, where input key/value pairs are transformed into intermediate key/value pairs.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The Mapper takes input key/value pairs and produces intermediate key/value pairs as output.

DEPENDENCIES:

The Mapper class depends on the MapContext interface, which provides access to the input data and allows the Mapper to write output.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
This class provides methods for reporting status and progress to the system.

CORE LOGIC:
The class provides methods for reporting status and progress to the system.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The class provides methods for reporting status and progress to the system.

DEPENDENCIES:
The class provides methods for reporting status and progress to the system.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
This code implements a mapper class that can be used to perform field selections in a manner similar to unix cut.

CORE LOGIC:
The mapper will ignore the key to the map function and the fields are from the value only if the input format is TextInputFormat. Otherwise, the fields are the union of those from the key and those from the value.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The input data is treated as fields separated by a user specified separator (the default value is "\t"). The user can specify a list of fields that form the map output keys, and a list of fields that form the map output values.

DEPENDENCIES:
This code depends on the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.fieldsel package.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
The main purpose of this chunk of code is to create a Mapper that swaps the keys and values.

CORE LOGIC:
The key algorithm or processing pattern visible in this chunk is the map function, which takes in a key and value and writes the value and key swapped to the context.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The data flowing in is the input key and value, and the data flowing out is the swapped key and value.

DEPENDENCIES:
The key imported, parent, or collaborator classes visible in this chunk are the Mapper class and its context.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

Multithreaded implementation for org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.Mapper.

CORE LOGIC:

The Map-Reduce job has to be configured with the mapper to use via setMapperClass(Job, Class) and the number of thread the thread-pool can use with the getNumberOfThreads(JobContext) method. The default value is 10 threads.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The application's maps using a thread pool.

DEPENDENCIES:

org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.Mapper, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.map.MultithreadedMapper, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.RecordReader, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.RecordWriter, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.StatusReporter, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.task.MapContextImpl, org.apache.hadoop

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

This code chunk is a Mapper class that extends the Mapper class from the Apache Hadoop MapReduce library. It is used to tokenize input values and emit each word with a count of 1.

CORE LOGIC:

The map() method of this class takes in an object key and a Text value as input. It then tokenizes the value using the StringTokenizer class and emits each word as a Text key and an IntWritable value of 1.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The map() method takes in an object key and a Text value as input. It then tokenizes the value using the StringTokenizer class and emits each word as a Text key and an IntWritable value of 1.

DEPENDENCIES:

This class depends on the following classes:

- org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.Mapper: This is the parent class that this class extends.
- org.apache.hadoop.io.IntWritable: This is a class that represents an integer value that can be written to and read from a data input stream.
- org.apache.hadoop.io.Text: This is a class that represents a sequence of characters that can be written to and read from a data input stream.
- java.util.StringTokenizer: This is a class that can be used to break a string into tokens.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

This class wraps a given Mapper to allow custom Mapper.Context implementations.

CORE LOGIC:

The core logic of this class is to provide a wrapped Mapper.Context for custom implementations.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The class takes a MapContext as input and provides a wrapped Mapper.Context as output.

DEPENDENCIES:

This class depends on the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce package and its dependencies.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
The MapContextImpl class is a context object that is given to the Mapper.

CORE LOGIC:
The MapContextImpl class provides access to the input split, current key and value, and methods for reading the next key-value pair.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The MapContextImpl class takes an InputSplit, RecordReader, RecordWriter, OutputCommitter, StatusReporter, and Configuration as input parameters. It provides methods for getting the input split, current key and value, and reading the next key-value pair.

DEPENDENCIES:
The MapContextImpl class depends on the RecordReader, InputSplit, RecordWriter, OutputCommitter, StatusReporter, and Configuration classes.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
This class is a context object that allows input and output from the task. It is only supplied to the Mapper or Reducer.

CORE LOGIC:
The class provides methods for advancing to the next key-value pair, getting the current key and value, and generating output key-value pairs.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The class takes a Configuration object, a TaskAttemptID object, a RecordWriter object for output, an OutputCommitter object, and a StatusReporter object as input.

DEPENDENCIES:
The class depends on the Configuration, TaskAttemptID, RecordWriter, OutputCommitter, and StatusReporter classes.
